pkgmetadata.longdescription: Access package information from Arch Linux's AUR via its RPC interface. The main exposed functions reflect those of the RPC: - info: Get metadata for one package. - multiinfo: Get metadata for many packages at once. - search: Get limited metadata for packages that match a given regex. - msearch: Get metadata for all packages maintained by a given user. By default this library supports version 2 of the RPC, and hence version 3.x of the AUR.
